name: elevenlabs_ui_blocks
description: Deterministic reference for ElevenLabs pre-built blocks — full-page templates combining multiple UI components. Install via CLI and adapt for this project.

voice-chat-01.description: Full voice chat with text input and message history
voice-chat-01.marcela_fit: Replace default widget with custom full chat experience

voice-chat-02.description: Minimal orb-centered voice interface, push-to-talk style
voice-chat-02.marcela_fit: Floating ambient orb on all pages

voice-chat-03.description: Chat with option to escalate to phone call

transcriber-01.description: Upload audio file for transcription with waveform

realtime-transcriber-01.description: Live microphone transcription with Scribe v2

voice-form-01.description: Form fields filled by speaking instead of typing
voice-form-01.marcela_fit: Voice-fill property data entry and assumption forms

music-player-01.description: Playlist player with track list and controls

adaptation_steps: Move files to client/src/components/ or client/src/pages/
Replace hardcoded agent IDs with signed URL flow
Apply Dark Glass / Light Cream theme
Wire to useConversation hook or widget
Add data-testid attributes per project convention
